sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107170" key="u(pece/leusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπεξ-έλευσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n107170.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">punishment,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> (prob. an error for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπεξ-</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
